THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP THE PEOLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND THROUGH DENNIS J. HERRERA, CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, PRAVIN DAHYABHAI PATEL, GEORGE PATEL, SANJAY $140,000.00 CIVIL PENALTIES, ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140,000.00, STIPULATED INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY $140,000.00 NO LATER THAN APR-01-2005. PROVISIONS OF THE INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT ARE APPLICABLE TO THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 6600 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, KNOWN AS THE "FRANCISCAN HOTEL". TERMS SHALL BE IN EFFECT FOR 60 MONTHS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THE STIPULATED INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT REGARDING OUTSTANDING NOTICES OF VIOLATION AND PENALTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP THE PEOLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA BY AND THROUGH DENNIS J. HERRERA, CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, PRAVIN DAHYABHAI PATEL, GEORGE PATEL, SANJAY $140,000.00 CIVIL PENALTIES, ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $140,000.00, STIPULATED INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT. DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY $140,000.00 NO LATER THAN APR-01-2005. PROVISIONS OF THE INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT ARE APPLICABLE TO THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 6600 THIRD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, KNOWN AS THE "FRANCISCAN HOTEL". TERMS SHALL BE IN EFFECT FOR 60 MONTHS FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF THE STIPULATED INJUNCTION AND JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT REGARDING OUTSTANDING NOTICES OF VIOLATION AND PENALTIES.
